gates.finding: Overall verdict is research-viable, not production-proven; planted and schema-shaped controls prove the mechanism can work under controlled conditions.
gates.promotion_requirement: Do not count planted or schema-shaped controls as generalized natural-corpus proof.

gates.finding: 20 frozen replication corpora exist across 17 independence groups, with 13 ordinary and 7 control corpora.
gates.promotion_requirement: Integrate replication corpora into expensive matrices only with an explicit regeneration budget or after prefix>=5/exact/selected-span evidence appears.

gates.finding: Raw held-out expansion has 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact-hit rows, and 0 selected-span rows.
gates.promotion_requirement: Promote only after unrelated ordinary held-out corpora produce repeatable prefix>=5, exact hits, or selected spans while controls stay null.

gates.finding: Transform validation has 11 held-out prefix>=4 win corpora but 0 held-out prefix>=5 win corpora and 0 exact hits.
gates.promotion_requirement: Treat prefix-4 movement as steering telemetry until a transform produces held-out prefix>=5 or exact seed-span wins after metadata accounting.

gates.finding: Match discovery scanned 11154720 target spans across 42 corpora and found 0 exact-hit rows and 0 selected-span rows.
gates.promotion_requirement: Change match-discovery strategy before returning to sidecar packing or natural-corpus claims.

gates.finding: Best non-planted case is http-headers-heldout::sub-lag-2 at 828.0 GiB for one expected exact hit with 0 observed exact hits.
gates.promotion_requirement: Require a materially better forecast, preferably below 1 GiB per expected exact hit, before broad raw depth search.

gates.finding: Generalization controls scanned 71250 spans and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, and 0 selected spans.
gates.promotion_requirement: Keep controls null while adding ordinary wins; null controls alone do not prove compression.

gates.finding: Long-span bundle gate has 0 of 8 gates met and recommendation hold_long_span_bundle_sweeps.
gates.promotion_requirement: Do not run broad long-span sweeps until search frontier, selected-span, raw-suffix, and control gates pass.

gates.finding: Search frontier gate has 0 of 7 gates met; broad_depth_search_allowed=False; best forecast 828.0 GiB.
gates.promotion_requirement: Do not run broad depth-3, full depth-4, or raw depth escalation until the generated search-frontier gate opens.

gates.finding: Decision is hold_gated_compute_and_continue_evidence_maintenance; frontier status is no_ungated_compute_ready with 0 ready ungated experiments.
gates.promotion_requirement: A new generated artifact must reopen a lane before compute-heavy natural-corpus work resumes.

gates.finding: Scorecard has 38 open areas and 3 blocked-by-evidence areas.
gates.promotion_requirement: Resolve natural-corpus and transform blockers with generated evidence, not prose promotion.

promotion_rule: Do not claim natural-corpus viability until unrelated ordinary held-out corpora produce repeatable selected spans or negative delta, controls stay null, and the generated search-frontier/long-span gates open.
